items.title: Hacktivists call out Trump by hacking and defacing US Army websites
items.summary: The U.S. Army has fixed two of its websites that were hacked to display messages calling President Trump a "pedophile" and a "thief."

items.title: Mark Zuckerberg's biggest legal nightmare yet could cost Meta $1.4T

items.summary: The White House accuses the public institution of “extreme activism”; plus, an interview with queer icon Carmelita Tropicana.

items.title: Trump Accuses Smithsonian of “Anti-White Activism” in Draconian New Report
items.summary: The White House’s 162-page document claims museum leadership has promoted "extreme political activism."
